init_hook: if [ ! -d .venv ]; then echo '📦 Creating virtual environment...' && uv venv; fi
if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then uv pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '📚 Dependencies installed'; fi
# Ensure PostgreSQL listens on TCP for Docker connections
# Allow trust connections from Docker network (must be BEFORE other host rules)

grep -q 'host all all 0.0.0.0/0 trust' .devbox/var/lib/postgres/pg_hba.conf || (echo 'host all all 0.0.0.0/0 trust' | cat - .devbox/var/lib/postgres/pg_hba.conf > /tmp/pg_hba.tmp && mv /tmp/pg_hba.tmp .devbox/var/lib/postgres/pg_hba.conf)
# Restart if running to apply config changes, otherwise start

pg_ctl status -D .devbox/var/lib/postgres > /dev/null 2>&1 && pg_ctl restart -D .devbox/var/lib/postgres -l .devbox/var/log/postgres.log -w > /dev/null 2>&1 || pg_ctl -D .devbox/var/lib/postgres -l .devbox/var/log/postgres.log -o '-c unix_socket_directories=/tmp' -w start > /dev/null 2>&1 &
